name: Media Post
description: Post-edit publishing kit — VLM cover picker (Qwen-VL-max 6-axis aesthetics), smart-recompose horizontal->vertical with EMA-smoothed subject tracking, 5-platform SEO pack (Qwen-Plus), and chapter cards (Playwright + ffmpeg drawtext fallback)

description_i18n.zh: 视频成片到发布物料一站式 — VLM 智能选封面（Qwen-VL-max 6 维美学评分）/ 横竖屏智能重构图（EMA 平滑 + 主体跟踪）/ 5 平台 SEO 包（Qwen-Plus）/ 章节卡渲染（Playwright 主路径 + ffmpeg drawtext 降级）
description_i18n.en: One-stop publishing kit from edited video to platform-ready assets — smart cover picking (Qwen-VL-max 6-axis scoring), horizontal-to-vertical smart recompose (EMA-smoothed subject tracking), 5-platform SEO pack (Qwen-Plus), chapter cards (Playwright primary + ffmpeg drawtext fallback)

author: OpenAkita
